item.title: Train your own AI free now [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:title: Train your own AI free now [Developers Apps]
item.itunes:author: bimex
item.itunes:summary:
Train your own AI free now
(Developers Apps)
💰 Welcome to Divora – Your Affordable AI Solution! 🚀

Looking to unlock AI excellence without breaking the bank? Look no further! Divora is here to empower everyone, from small businesses to passionate enthusiasts, without costing a fortune! 💸


👩‍💼 Are you a small business owner? 🙋‍♂️ An AI enthusiast? Divora welcomes you all with open arms! 🎉


🎩 Say goodbye to costly development! No need to spend millions. Divora's budget-friendly approach makes AI accessible to all! 💰🚀


🔍 No more digging through endless open-source articles or colabs that don't work! Just upload your data, and Divora takes care of the rest. It's AI made easy! 🪄


🧠 For the true AI pioneers, Divora offers complete control over AI training. Build from scratch without breaking the bank! 💡


💡 And here's the game-changer: After training, Divora lets you export the simple code. Your AI, your code, your rules! 📦🛠️


Ready to embrace AI without the high costs and frustrations? Join the AI revolution with Divora! 🌐 Your affordable AI adventure begins right here – now anyone, including you, can build your very own AI! 🚀✨


Come and experience the magic of AI with Divora – where affordability meets excellence! 🌟🤖
[read more]

💰 Welcome to Divora – Your Affordable AI Solution! 🚀

Looking to unlock AI excellence without breaking the bank? Look no further! Divora is here to empower everyone, from small businesses to passionate enthusiasts, without costing a fortune! 💸


👩‍💼 Are you a small business owner? 🙋‍♂️ An AI enthusiast? Divora welcomes you all with open arms! 🎉

Ready to embrace AI without the high costs and frustrations? Join the AI revolution with Divora! 🌐 Your affordable AI adventure begins right here – now anyone, including you, can build your very own AI! 🚀✨


Come and experience the magic of AI with Divora – where affordability meets excellence! 🌟🤖

Train your own AI free now
(Developers Apps)
💰 Welcome to Divora – Your Affordable AI Solution! 🚀

Looking to unlock AI excellence without breaking the bank? Look no further! Divora is here to empower everyone, from small businesses to passionate enthusiasts, without costing a fortune! 💸


👩‍💼 Are you a small business owner? 🙋‍♂️ An AI enthusiast? Divora welcomes you all with open arms! 🎉


🎩 Say goodbye to costly development! No need to spend millions. Divora's budget-friendly approach makes AI accessible to all! 💰🚀


🔍 No more digging through endless open-source articles or colabs that don't work! Just upload your data, and Divora takes care of the rest. It's AI made easy! 🪄


🧠 For the true AI pioneers, Divora offers complete control over AI training. Build from scratch without breaking the bank! 💡


💡 And here's the game-changer: After training, Divora lets you export the simple code. Your AI, your code, your rules! 📦🛠️


Ready to embrace AI without the high costs and frustrations? Join the AI revolution with Divora! 🌐 Your affordable AI adventure begins right here – now anyone, including you, can build your very own AI! 🚀✨


Come and experience the magic of AI with Divora – where affordability meets excellence! 🌟🤖
[read more]

item.title: GS RAM OPTIMIZER A.I [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS RAM OPTIMIZER A.I [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS RAM OPTIMIZER A.I
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Title: Unlocking Unmatched Performance: Introducing Godspeed Termux RAM Booster for No Root Users
In the ever-evolving landscape of technology, the quest for optimizing device performance knows no bounds. For users of Termux seeking to unleash the full potential of their devices without the hassle of rooting, the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster emerges as a beacon of efficiency and power. Developed by the acclaimed mind behind the pseudonym "revWhiteShadow," this cutting-edge tool revolutionizes the concept of RAM optimization for non-rooted users.

Understanding the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster
The Godspeed Termux RAM Booster is a sophisticated solution meticulously crafted to elevate device performance to unparalleled heights. It leverages advanced algorithms and optimization techniques to free up RAM, thereby enhancing multitasking capabilities, speeding up app launches, and ensuring a seamless user experience.

Features That Set Godspeed Apart
Efficiency Redefined: Unlike conventional RAM boosters, Godspeed operates with surgical precision, identifying and eliminating resource-hogging processes while preserving essential system functions. This ensures optimal performance without compromising stability.

User-Friendly Interface: Designed with simplicity in mind, Godspeed offers an intuitive interface that empowers users of all levels to optimize their devices effortlessly. With just a few taps, users can initiate the boosting process and witness instant improvements in performance.

Compatibility Across Platforms: Whether you're running Termux on a 32-bit or 64-bit architecture, Godspeed has you covered. Its versatility ensures compatibility with a wide range of devices, allowing users to experience enhanced performance regardless of their hardware specifications.

Continuous Development: The genius behind Godspeed, known as revWhiteShadow, is committed to ongoing development and refinement. Regular updates and enhancements ensure that users always have access to the latest advancements in RAM optimization technology.

How to Supercharge Your Termux Experience with Godspeed
Preparation: Ensure that your Termux environment is up to date by executing the provided package update commands. This ensures compatibility and optimal performance with the Godspeed RAM booster.

Installation: Clone the Godspeed repository from GitHub using the provided Git command. Navigate to the cloned directory and grant executable permissions to the appropriate binary file based on your device's architecture (GSNRRM64 for 64-bit, GSNRRM32 for 32-bit).

Activation: Execute the respective binary file to initiate the Godspeed RAM boosting process. Sit back and witness as Godspeed optimizes your device's RAM, unlocking its true potential without the need for root access.

Conclusion
In a world where speed and efficiency reign supreme, the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster stands as a testament to innovation and ingenuity. With its unrivaled performance-enhancing capabilities and user-friendly interface, it empowers Termux users to maximize productivity and enjoyment without the complexities of rooting. Say goodbye to sluggish performance and hello to the lightning-fast responsiveness of Godspeed. Experience the difference today and elevate your Termux experience to new heights.






[read more]
item.description:
GS RAM OPTIMIZER A.I
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Title: Unlocking Unmatched Performance: Introducing Godspeed Termux RAM Booster for No Root Users
In the ever-evolving landscape of technology, the quest for optimizing device performance knows no bounds. For users of Termux seeking to unleash the full potential of their devices without the hassle of rooting, the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster emerges as a beacon of efficiency and power. Developed by the acclaimed mind behind the pseudonym "revWhiteShadow," this cutting-edge tool revolutionizes the concept of RAM optimization for non-rooted users.

Understanding the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster
The Godspeed Termux RAM Booster is a sophisticated solution meticulously crafted to elevate device performance to unparalleled heights. It leverages advanced algorithms and optimization techniques to free up RAM, thereby enhancing multitasking capabilities, speeding up app launches, and ensuring a seamless user experience.

Features That Set Godspeed Apart
Efficiency Redefined: Unlike conventional RAM boosters, Godspeed operates with surgical precision, identifying and eliminating resource-hogging processes while preserving essential system functions. This ensures optimal performance without compromising stability.

User-Friendly Interface: Designed with simplicity in mind, Godspeed offers an intuitive interface that empowers users of all levels to optimize their devices effortlessly. With just a few taps, users can initiate the boosting process and witness instant improvements in performance.

Compatibility Across Platforms: Whether you're running Termux on a 32-bit or 64-bit architecture, Godspeed has you covered. Its versatility ensures compatibility with a wide range of devices, allowing users to experience enhanced performance regardless of their hardware specifications.

Continuous Development: The genius behind Godspeed, known as revWhiteShadow, is committed to ongoing development and refinement. Regular updates and enhancements ensure that users always have access to the latest advancements in RAM optimization technology.

How to Supercharge Your Termux Experience with Godspeed
Preparation: Ensure that your Termux environment is up to date by executing the provided package update commands. This ensures compatibility and optimal performance with the Godspeed RAM booster.

Installation: Clone the Godspeed repository from GitHub using the provided Git command. Navigate to the cloned directory and grant executable permissions to the appropriate binary file based on your device's architecture (GSNRRM64 for 64-bit, GSNRRM32 for 32-bit).

Activation: Execute the respective binary file to initiate the Godspeed RAM boosting process. Sit back and witness as Godspeed optimizes your device's RAM, unlocking its true potential without the need for root access.

Conclusion
In a world where speed and efficiency reign supreme, the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster stands as a testament to innovation and ingenuity. With its unrivaled performance-enhancing capabilities and user-friendly interface, it empowers Termux users to maximize productivity and enjoyment without the complexities of rooting. Say goodbye to sluggish performance and hello to the lightning-fast responsiveness of Godspeed. Experience the difference today and elevate your Termux experience to new heights.






[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GS RAM OPTIMIZER A.I
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Title: Unlocking Unmatched Performance: Introducing Godspeed Termux RAM Booster for No Root Users
In the ever-evolving landscape of technology, the quest for optimizing device performance knows no bounds. For users of Termux seeking to unleash the full potential of their devices without the hassle of rooting, the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster emerges as a beacon of efficiency and power. Developed by the acclaimed mind behind the pseudonym "revWhiteShadow," this cutting-edge tool revolutionizes the concept of RAM optimization for non-rooted users.

Understanding the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster
The Godspeed Termux RAM Booster is a sophisticated solution meticulously crafted to elevate device performance to unparalleled heights. It leverages advanced algorithms and optimization techniques to free up RAM, thereby enhancing multitasking capabilities, speeding up app launches, and ensuring a seamless user experience.

Features That Set Godspeed Apart
Efficiency Redefined: Unlike conventional RAM boosters, Godspeed operates with surgical precision, identifying and eliminating resource-hogging processes while preserving essential system functions. This ensures optimal performance without compromising stability.

User-Friendly Interface: Designed with simplicity in mind, Godspeed offers an intuitive interface that empowers users of all levels to optimize their devices effortlessly. With just a few taps, users can initiate the boosting process and witness instant improvements in performance.

Compatibility Across Platforms: Whether you're running Termux on a 32-bit or 64-bit architecture, Godspeed has you covered. Its versatility ensures compatibility with a wide range of devices, allowing users to experience enhanced performance regardless of their hardware specifications.

Continuous Development: The genius behind Godspeed, known as revWhiteShadow, is committed to ongoing development and refinement. Regular updates and enhancements ensure that users always have access to the latest advancements in RAM optimization technology.

How to Supercharge Your Termux Experience with Godspeed
Preparation: Ensure that your Termux environment is up to date by executing the provided package update commands. This ensures compatibility and optimal performance with the Godspeed RAM booster.

Installation: Clone the Godspeed repository from GitHub using the provided Git command. Navigate to the cloned directory and grant executable permissions to the appropriate binary file based on your device's architecture (GSNRRM64 for 64-bit, GSNRRM32 for 32-bit).

Activation: Execute the respective binary file to initiate the Godspeed RAM boosting process. Sit back and witness as Godspeed optimizes your device's RAM, unlocking its true potential without the need for root access.

Conclusion
In a world where speed and efficiency reign supreme, the Godspeed Termux RAM Booster stands as a testament to innovation and ingenuity. With its unrivaled performance-enhancing capabilities and user-friendly interface, it empowers Termux users to maximize productivity and enjoyment without the complexities of rooting. Say goodbye to sluggish performance and hello to the lightning-fast responsiveness of Godspeed. Experience the difference today and elevate your Termux experience to new heights.






[read more]

item.title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: faster
item.itunes:summary:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.description:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Linux[/b], [b]Windows[/b], [b]macOS[/b], [b]FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert[/b], [b]resize[/b], [b]rotate[/b], and [b]flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF[/b] document into a set of images with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+[/b] formats, set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for [b]free[/b]!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Change the format of an image or group of images simultaneously.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress one or multiple images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a batch of images

You can find more details about [b]Converseen[/b] on the [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net]official website[/url] or on [url=https://github.com/Faster3ck/Converseen]GitHub[/url]. If you enjoy this work, feel free to contribute to its development by making a donation on [url=https://converseen.fasterland.net/donate]PayPal, Ko-Fi, or using Cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, LTC, DOGE)[/url]!

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows 7/8/10/11[/b][/li]
[li][b]macOS 12 Monterey or later[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]

item.title: Android Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: mobilephonedata
item.itunes:summary:
Android Recovery
(Utilities)
Site www.data-recovery-mobile-phone.com provides Android Recovery utility that does not need any special technical assistance from novice users in restoring back their deleted text files and folders from android based handsets. Data regain utility claims for minimal span of turn round time and efforts in regaining accidentally deleted videos from android phone.

[read more]
item.description:
Android Recovery
(Utilities)
Site www.data-recovery-mobile-phone.com provides Android Recovery utility that does not need any special technical assistance from novice users in restoring back their deleted text files and folders from android based handsets. Data regain utility claims for minimal span of turn round time and efforts in regaining accidentally deleted videos from android phone.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Android Recovery
(Utilities)
Site www.data-recovery-mobile-phone.com provides Android Recovery utility that does not need any special technical assistance from novice users in restoring back their deleted text files and folders from android based handsets. Data regain utility claims for minimal span of turn round time and efforts in regaining accidentally deleted videos from android phone.

[read more]

item.title: Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Card Restore
(Utilities)
Card Restore application allows user to easily get back all crashed memorable snapshots, valuable images saved in formatted memory cards of your camcorder device. Innovative Card Restore software is useful in regaining deleted text files and folder saved in different format or extensions within minimal time period. Download Memory card data recovery program from www.memorycardrestore.com that offers you beast way to bring back whole damaged family images, audio, video from logically crashed compact flash cards. Card Restore application makes you capable in recovering overall misplaced data even if card read/ write error displayed on your computer or laptop. Easy to use memory card data restoration software is useful in retrieving entire video clips saved in any format or extensions. Card Restore program makes you capable in recovering your most precious anniversary images from accidentally removed memory card within minimal time period. Memory card data recovery program offers you best way to easily recovery overall formatted folders from damaged XD cards of any capacity. Card Restore program provides facility to get back all memorable images from improper handled multimedia memory cards and more. Card Restore application makes you capable in restoring whole friend’s images from logically corrupted compact flash cards just in few mouse clicks.Features:*Card recovery software supports all major USB memory cards for data loss recovery.* Easy to use and restore entire corrupted files and folder without wasting your valuable time and money.* Quickly retrieve erased or misplaced folders even if card read/ write error generated or displayed on your device.* restore accidentally damaged pictures saved in logically formatted secure data cards of any capacity within minimal time.

[read more]
item.description:
Card Restore
(Utilities)
Card Restore application allows user to easily get back all crashed memorable snapshots, valuable images saved in formatted memory cards of your camcorder device. Innovative Card Restore software is useful in regaining deleted text files and folder saved in different format or extensions within minimal time period. Download Memory card data recovery program from www.memorycardrestore.com that offers you beast way to bring back whole damaged family images, audio, video from logically crashed compact flash cards. Card Restore application makes you capable in recovering overall misplaced data even if card read/ write error displayed on your computer or laptop. Easy to use memory card data restoration software is useful in retrieving entire video clips saved in any format or extensions. Card Restore program makes you capable in recovering your most precious anniversary images from accidentally removed memory card within minimal time period. Memory card data recovery program offers you best way to easily recovery overall formatted folders from damaged XD cards of any capacity. Card Restore program provides facility to get back all memorable images from improper handled multimedia memory cards and more. Card Restore application makes you capable in restoring whole friend’s images from logically corrupted compact flash cards just in few mouse clicks.Features:*Card recovery software supports all major USB memory cards for data loss recovery.* Easy to use and restore entire corrupted files and folder without wasting your valuable time and money.* Quickly retrieve erased or misplaced folders even if card read/ write error generated or displayed on your device.* restore accidentally damaged pictures saved in logically formatted secure data cards of any capacity within minimal time.

[read more]

Card Restore
(Utilities)
Card Restore application allows user to easily get back all crashed memorable snapshots, valuable images saved in formatted memory cards of your camcorder device. Innovative Card Restore software is useful in regaining deleted text files and folder saved in different format or extensions within minimal time period. Download Memory card data recovery program from www.memorycardrestore.com that offers you beast way to bring back whole damaged family images, audio, video from logically crashed compact flash cards. Card Restore application makes you capable in recovering overall misplaced data even if card read/ write error displayed on your computer or laptop. Easy to use memory card data restoration software is useful in retrieving entire video clips saved in any format or extensions. Card Restore program makes you capable in recovering your most precious anniversary images from accidentally removed memory card within minimal time period. Memory card data recovery program offers you best way to easily recovery overall formatted folders from damaged XD cards of any capacity. Card Restore program provides facility to get back all memorable images from improper handled multimedia memory cards and more. Card Restore application makes you capable in restoring whole friend’s images from logically corrupted compact flash cards just in few mouse clicks.Features:*Card recovery software supports all major USB memory cards for data loss recovery.* Easy to use and restore entire corrupted files and folder without wasting your valuable time and money.* Quickly retrieve erased or misplaced folders even if card read/ write error generated or displayed on your device.* restore accidentally damaged pictures saved in logically formatted secure data cards of any capacity within minimal time.

[read more]

item.title: digiKam [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: digiKam [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: digikamdeveloper
item.itunes:summary:
digiKam
(Graphic Apps)
digiKam is an advanced digital [b]photo management application[/b], which makes importing and organizing digital photos a "snap". The photos can be organized in albums which can be sorted chronologically, by directory layout or by custom collections.
Tired of the directory constraints? Don’t worry, digiKam also provides [b]tagging functionality[/b]. You tag your images which can be spread out across multiple folders and digiKam provides fast and intuitive ways to browse these tagged images. You can also add [b]comments and rating[/b] to your images. digiKam makes use of a fast and robust database to store these meta-informations which makes adding and editing of comments and tags very reliable.

An easy to use interface is provided that enables you to [b]connect to your camera[/b] and preview, download and/or delete your images. digiKam includes too an image editor for image corrections and manipulations.

Another tool, which most artists and photographers will be familiar with, is a [b]Light Table[/b]. This tool assists artists and photographers with reviewing their work ensuring only the highest quality. A light table will show the artist their imperfections in which they can go and touch up. Well in digiKam, the light table function provides the user a similar experience. You can import a photo, drag it onto the light table, and touch up only the areas that need it.

The digiKam [b]Image Editor[/b] come with some common tools e.g. red eye correction or colors correction. Additional tools are provided with the main application to process advanced corrections on image like color management, noise reduction, or special effects. digiKam Image Editor support all camera RAW file formats, 16 bits color depth, Exif/Makernote/IPTC/GPS metadata, Color management, tagging/rating/comments pictures, etc.

A lots of search tools are also available to be able to find specific photo on whole collection : [b]Time line[/b], Calendar, Advanced Search using multiple and complex database queries (tags, rating, keywords, date, location, camera, shot settings, etc.)

A stand-alone image editor version named [b]Showfoto[/b] is also available. It runs without digiKam images database support, but provides all Image Editor tools.

See the related project page for more information:

[url]http://www.digikam.org[/url]

Online documentations:

[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/digikam/index.html[/url]
[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/showfoto/index.html[/url]

NOTE:

- Please, use the digiKam mailing-list for all comments:

[b]digikam-users at kde dot org[/b]

- Please, use Bug Tracking System for wishes and reports:
[url]http://bugs.kde.org/buglist.cgi?product=digikam[/url]

You can contact developers on Freenode IRC channels:

[b]#digikam[/b]

or using the developers mailing-list :

[b]digikam-devel at kde dot org[/b]

To help digiKam project, you can [u]donate money to developers[/u]. Take a look at this page for details:

[url]http://www.digikam.org/donation[/url]
[read more]
item.description:
digiKam
(Graphic Apps)
digiKam is an advanced digital [b]photo management application[/b], which makes importing and organizing digital photos a "snap". The photos can be organized in albums which can be sorted chronologically, by directory layout or by custom collections.
Tired of the directory constraints? Don’t worry, digiKam also provides [b]tagging functionality[/b]. You tag your images which can be spread out across multiple folders and digiKam provides fast and intuitive ways to browse these tagged images. You can also add [b]comments and rating[/b] to your images. digiKam makes use of a fast and robust database to store these meta-informations which makes adding and editing of comments and tags very reliable.

An easy to use interface is provided that enables you to [b]connect to your camera[/b] and preview, download and/or delete your images. digiKam includes too an image editor for image corrections and manipulations.

Another tool, which most artists and photographers will be familiar with, is a [b]Light Table[/b]. This tool assists artists and photographers with reviewing their work ensuring only the highest quality. A light table will show the artist their imperfections in which they can go and touch up. Well in digiKam, the light table function provides the user a similar experience. You can import a photo, drag it onto the light table, and touch up only the areas that need it.

The digiKam [b]Image Editor[/b] come with some common tools e.g. red eye correction or colors correction. Additional tools are provided with the main application to process advanced corrections on image like color management, noise reduction, or special effects. digiKam Image Editor support all camera RAW file formats, 16 bits color depth, Exif/Makernote/IPTC/GPS metadata, Color management, tagging/rating/comments pictures, etc.

A lots of search tools are also available to be able to find specific photo on whole collection : [b]Time line[/b], Calendar, Advanced Search using multiple and complex database queries (tags, rating, keywords, date, location, camera, shot settings, etc.)

A stand-alone image editor version named [b]Showfoto[/b] is also available. It runs without digiKam images database support, but provides all Image Editor tools.

See the related project page for more information:

[url]http://www.digikam.org[/url]

Online documentations:

[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/digikam/index.html[/url]
[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/showfoto/index.html[/url]

NOTE:

- Please, use the digiKam mailing-list for all comments:

[b]digikam-users at kde dot org[/b]

- Please, use Bug Tracking System for wishes and reports:
[url]http://bugs.kde.org/buglist.cgi?product=digikam[/url]

You can contact developers on Freenode IRC channels:

[b]#digikam[/b]

or using the developers mailing-list :

[b]digikam-devel at kde dot org[/b]

To help digiKam project, you can [u]donate money to developers[/u]. Take a look at this page for details:

[url]http://www.digikam.org/donation[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
digiKam
(Graphic Apps)
digiKam is an advanced digital [b]photo management application[/b], which makes importing and organizing digital photos a "snap". The photos can be organized in albums which can be sorted chronologically, by directory layout or by custom collections.
Tired of the directory constraints? Don’t worry, digiKam also provides [b]tagging functionality[/b]. You tag your images which can be spread out across multiple folders and digiKam provides fast and intuitive ways to browse these tagged images. You can also add [b]comments and rating[/b] to your images. digiKam makes use of a fast and robust database to store these meta-informations which makes adding and editing of comments and tags very reliable.

An easy to use interface is provided that enables you to [b]connect to your camera[/b] and preview, download and/or delete your images. digiKam includes too an image editor for image corrections and manipulations.

Another tool, which most artists and photographers will be familiar with, is a [b]Light Table[/b]. This tool assists artists and photographers with reviewing their work ensuring only the highest quality. A light table will show the artist their imperfections in which they can go and touch up. Well in digiKam, the light table function provides the user a similar experience. You can import a photo, drag it onto the light table, and touch up only the areas that need it.

The digiKam [b]Image Editor[/b] come with some common tools e.g. red eye correction or colors correction. Additional tools are provided with the main application to process advanced corrections on image like color management, noise reduction, or special effects. digiKam Image Editor support all camera RAW file formats, 16 bits color depth, Exif/Makernote/IPTC/GPS metadata, Color management, tagging/rating/comments pictures, etc.

A lots of search tools are also available to be able to find specific photo on whole collection : [b]Time line[/b], Calendar, Advanced Search using multiple and complex database queries (tags, rating, keywords, date, location, camera, shot settings, etc.)

A stand-alone image editor version named [b]Showfoto[/b] is also available. It runs without digiKam images database support, but provides all Image Editor tools.

See the related project page for more information:

[url]http://www.digikam.org[/url]

Online documentations:

[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/digikam/index.html[/url]
[url]http://docs.kde.org/development/en/extragear-graphics/showfoto/index.html[/url]

NOTE:

- Please, use the digiKam mailing-list for all comments:

[b]digikam-users at kde dot org[/b]

- Please, use Bug Tracking System for wishes and reports:
[url]http://bugs.kde.org/buglist.cgi?product=digikam[/url]

You can contact developers on Freenode IRC channels:

[b]#digikam[/b]

or using the developers mailing-list :

[b]digikam-devel at kde dot org[/b]

To help digiKam project, you can [u]donate money to developers[/u]. Take a look at this page for details:

[url]http://www.digikam.org/donation[/url]
[read more]

item.title: Mac Removable Media Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Removable Media Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Removable Media Restore
(Utilities)
Macintosh Restoration program recovers accidently misplaced audio, video, text, pictures from MMC card. Mac Removable Media Restore application available on link www.memorycardrestore.com which is used for restoring inaccessible data files and folders from mac USB mass storage multimedia device within few minutes.

[read more]
item.description:

(Utilities)
Macintosh Restoration program recovers accidently misplaced audio, video, text, pictures from MMC card. Mac Removable Media Restore application available on link www.memorycardrestore.com which is used for restoring inaccessible data files and folders from mac USB mass storage multimedia device within few minutes.

item.title: Vista Partition Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Vista Partition Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdeletedfiles
item.itunes:summary:
Vista Partition Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
How can you restore deleted or missing personal data and official document from damaged hard disk! Windows Vista partition recovery software salvages damaged or corrupted data, files, folders and directories due to inaccessible partition volume. Windows Vista data uneraser tool retrieves lost information such as txt, gif, ppt, doc, xls, mpeg, jpeg, jpg etc. Windows file repair software provides complete solution to restore formatted or corrupted FAT and NTFS windows partition. Windows data manager utility supports all major brands of storage media including Seagate, Hitachi, Toshiba, SanDisk, Samsung, Sony etc for providing complete solution of corrupted data recovery. Windows partition data salvage application retrieves data, files and folders which have been deleted by Shift + Del key. Windows Vista files undelete tool does not need any special technical knowledge or skill to operate the software. Windows Vista data repair software is designed to backup and restore important data, files, folders, directories and documents from undetected hard disk. Vista partition recovery specialist provides you in-built step by step data rescue help option. Windows Vista backup software provides salvage support to deleted long and short file name. Windows Vista files repair utility supports FAT as well as NTFS file system based hard disk. Features: * Windows backup files recovery software retrieves data, files and folders from previously existing partition. * Windows file systems rescue utility supports FAT32, FAT16, FAT12, NTFS and NTFS5 file system. * Windows Vista data uneraser tool retrieves erased data and files from inaccessible or corrupted hard drive. * Windows partition data salvage software backup lost video clips, wallpaper, photos, pictures, snaps, mp3, mp4 and song files.

[read more]

Vista Partition Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)

Windows Vista partition recovery software salvages damaged or corrupted data, files, folders and directories due to inaccessible partition volume. Windows Vista data uneraser tool retrieves lost information such as txt, gif, ppt, doc, xls, mpeg, jpeg, jpg etc. Windows file repair software provides complete solution to restore formatted or corrupted FAT and NTFS windows partition. Windows partition data salvage application retrieves data, files and folders which have been deleted by Shift + Del key. Windows Vista files repair utility supports FAT as well as NTFS file system based hard disk. Features: * Windows backup files recovery software retrieves data, files and folders from previously existing partition. * Windows file systems rescue utility supports FAT32, FAT16, FAT12, NTFS and NTFS5 file system. * Windows Vista data uneraser tool retrieves erased data and files from inaccessible or corrupted hard drive. * Windows partition data salvage software backup lost video clips, wallpaper, photos, pictures, snaps, mp3, mp4 and song files.

[read more]

Vista Partition Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
How can you restore deleted or missing personal data and official document from damaged hard disk! Windows Vista partition recovery software salvages damaged or corrupted data, files, folders and directories due to inaccessible partition volume. Windows Vista data uneraser tool retrieves lost information such as txt, gif, ppt, doc, xls, mpeg, jpeg, jpg etc. Windows file repair software provides complete solution to restore formatted or corrupted FAT and NTFS windows partition. Windows data manager utility supports all major brands of storage media including Seagate, Hitachi, Toshiba, SanDisk, Samsung, Sony etc for providing complete solution of corrupted data recovery. Windows partition data salvage application retrieves data, files and folders which have been deleted by Shift + Del key. Windows Vista files undelete tool does not need any special technical knowledge or skill to operate the software. Windows Vista data repair software is designed to backup and restore important data, files, folders, directories and documents from undetected hard disk. Vista partition recovery specialist provides you in-built step by step data rescue help option. Windows Vista backup software provides salvage support to deleted long and short file name. Windows Vista files repair utility supports FAT as well as NTFS file system based hard disk. item.title: Mac Memory Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Memory Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Memory Card Restore
(Utilities)
Download comprehensive files revival tool for Macintosh that enables users to rescue missing memorable picture collection from virus infected Mac OS based storage device. Simple to operate Macintosh DDR professional files rescue program enables users to undelete data that is erased due to virus attack on removable storage media. Professionally designed Mac Memory Card Restore software keeps safe retrieved video clipping at user defined location on computer system.

[read more]

Professionally designed Mac Memory Card Restore software keeps safe retrieved video clipping at user defined location on computer system.
